proposed_relations.description: Pre-Payment off-board fare collection SBS feature presented in CB17 slides

evidence_refs.source_quote: Pay before you board by dipping MetroCard at sidewalk MetroCard machine or inserting coins at sidewalk coin machine

decisions.rationale: Page 4 details 'How Pre-Payment Works' as part of the Nostrand SBS presentation to CB17.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 1. Pay before you board by dipping MetroCard at sidewalk MetroCard machine or inserting coins at sidewalk coin machine 2. Take your proof of payment receipt 3. Enter through front or rear door of bus – no need to show receipt to the driver

proposed_relations.description: Bus Bulb SBS Station at Empire Blvd featured in Nostrand SBS Project CB17 slides

evidence_refs.source_quote: Empire Blvd SBS Station
Bus Bulb: Sidewalks at SBS stations will extend out to the bus lane.

decisions.rationale: Page 8 is headed 'Nostrand SBS Project Features' and details the Empire Blvd SBS Station with bus bulb design.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Empire Blvd SBS Station

Local Bus Stop at curb New Shelter Fare Collection Machines Bus Bulb: Sidewalks at SBS stations will extend out to the bus lane. Buses will not need to pull in and out of traffic. Higher curbs on the SBS platform will allow for easier boarding.
